Class TransactionTest

java.lang.Object
ca.yorku.cmg.cnsim.engine.transaction.TransactionTest
public class TransactionTest extends Object
JUnit tests for Transaction.

Test design document: src/test/resources/test-design/ca/yorku/cmg/cnsim/engine/transaction/TransactionTest.md

  • Method Details

    • setUp

      @BeforeEach public void setUp()

    • testConstructor4Param_allZeroBoundaryValues

      @Test public void testConstructor4Param_allZeroBoundaryValues()
      TC-1: 4-param constructor with all zero boundary values. Satisfies: P1, P3, P5, B1, B3, B5, CD1

    • testConstructor4Param_typicalValidValues

      @Test public void testConstructor4Param_typicalValidValues()
      TC-2: 4-param constructor with typical valid values. Satisfies: G1, CD1

    • testConstructor4Param_negativeTimeThrowsException

      @Test public void testConstructor4Param_negativeTimeThrowsException()
      TC-3: 4-param constructor with negative time throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P2, B7, CD2

    • testConstructor4Param_negativeValueThrowsException

      @Test public void testConstructor4Param_negativeValueThrowsException()
      TC-4: 4-param constructor with negative value throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P4, B8, CD3

    • testConstructor4Param_negativeSizeThrowsException

      @Test public void testConstructor4Param_negativeSizeThrowsException()
      TC-5: 4-param constructor with negative size throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P6, B9, CD4

    • testConstructor5Param_validNodeID

      @Test public void testConstructor5Param_validNodeID()
      TC-6: 5-param constructor with valid nodeID. Satisfies: P9

    • testConstructor5Param_nodeIDMinusOne

      @Test public void testConstructor5Param_nodeIDMinusOne()
      TC-7: 5-param constructor with nodeID=-1 (unspecified). Satisfies: P8

    • testConstructor5Param_negativeTimeThrowsException

      @Test public void testConstructor5Param_negativeTimeThrowsException()
      TC-8: 5-param constructor with negative time throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P2

    • testConstructor5Param_negativeValueThrowsException

      @Test public void testConstructor5Param_negativeValueThrowsException()
      TC-9: 5-param constructor with negative value throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P4

    • testConstructor5Param_negativeSizeThrowsException

      @Test public void testConstructor5Param_negativeSizeThrowsException()
      TC-10: 5-param constructor with negative size throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P6

    • testDefaultConstructor

      @Test public void testDefaultConstructor()
      TC-11: Default constructor creates object with default values.

    • testConstructorSingleParam_setsID

      @Test public void testConstructorSingleParam_setsID()
      TC-12: Single-param constructor sets ID correctly.

    • testConstructorSingleParam_zeroID

      @Test public void testConstructorSingleParam_zeroID()
      TC-13: Single-param constructor with ID=0.

    • testIsSeedChanging_initiallyFalse

      @Test public void testIsSeedChanging_initiallyFalse()
      TC-14: isSeedChanging() returns false initially. Satisfies: P11

    • testMakeSeedChanging_setsFlagToTrue

      @Test public void testMakeSeedChanging_setsFlagToTrue()
      TC-15: makeSeedChanging() sets flag to true. Satisfies: P12

    • testGetNextTxID_returnsOneAfterReset

      @Test public void testGetNextTxID_returnsOneAfterReset()
      TC-16: After @BeforeEach reset, getNextTxID() returns 1. Satisfies: P13, P15

    • testGetNextTxID_incrementsSequentially

      @Test public void testGetNextTxID_incrementsSequentially()
      TC-17: getNextTxID() increments and returns sequential IDs. Satisfies: P14

    • testResetCurrID_resetsCounterToOne

      @Test public void testResetCurrID_resetsCounterToOne()
      TC-18: resetCurrID() resets counter back to 1. Satisfies: P14, P15

    • testSetValue_positiveValue

      @Test public void testSetValue_positiveValue()
      TC-19: setValue() with positive value. Satisfies: P16

    • testSetValue_zero

      @Test public void testSetValue_zero()
      TC-20: setValue() with zero. Satisfies: B10

      @Test public void testSetValue_negativeThrowsException()
      TC-21: setValue() with negative throws ArithmeticException. Satisfies: P17, B11
